_comment: Unqork Marketplace Package Manifest — Brightlite AI Intake & Scheduling
name: Brightlite AI Intake & Scheduling
description: Drop-in AI-powered intake and appointment scheduling for Unqork. Adds OTP-verified contact forms with AI classification, sentiment scoring, and auto-routing — plus full appointment scheduling with real-time availability, natural-language booking, and AI no-show risk scoring. Confirmation emails and SMS are sent automatically.
longDescription: Brightlite Middleware is a headless REST API that gives your Unqork application a complete AI-powered back-end for two high-value workflows: (1) verified contact/intake forms with AI triage and team routing, and (2) appointment booking with smart scheduling, OTP identity verification, and no-show risk scoring. The middleware is deployed independently of your Unqork instance — Brightlite hosts a shared instance, or you can self-host in your own cloud.

apps.name: Contact & Intake
apps.description: OTP-verified contact form with AI classification, spam detection, sentiment scoring, and automatic team routing.

apps.name: Appointment Scheduler
apps.description: Full appointment booking with service selection, real-time availability, natural-language smart scheduling, and AI no-show risk scoring.

connections.label: Brightlite API URL
connections.helpText: Base URL of your Brightlite middleware instance. Use the default for Brightlite-hosted, or enter your own URL for self-hosted deployments.

connections.label: Client ID
connections.helpText: Your unique client identifier — provided by Brightlite after account activation. Format: UUID.

connections.label: API Key
connections.helpText: Your secret API key — provided by Brightlite after account activation. Format: blt_live_xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx

connections.label: Admin Key (Setup Only)
connections.helpText: Only needed to run the Setup Wizard. This is a Brightlite-issued admin key — not required for day-to-day operations. Remove after completing setup.

steps.title: Connect to Brightlite
steps.description: Enter the connection credentials provided by Brightlite. If you don't have an account, visit brightlite.cloud to get started.

validationEndpoint.errorMessage: Could not connect to the Brightlite API. Check your credentials and try again.

steps.title: Choose Applications
steps.description: Select which Brightlite applications to install in your environment.

steps.title: Configure Your Setup
steps.description: Optional: Enter the Admin Key to run the in-app Setup Wizard and configure your services and routing without leaving Unqork.

steps.title: Complete
steps.description: Your Brightlite applications are installed. Open the Setup Wizard module to configure your services, schedule, and routing.

brightliteHosted.label: Brightlite Hosted (Recommended)
brightliteHosted.description: Brightlite runs and maintains the API. Zero infrastructure required. Get your Client ID and API key from brightlite.cloud.

selfHosted.label: Self-Hosted
selfHosted.description: Deploy the Brightlite Docker image in your own cloud (AWS, Azure, GCP, OCI, or on-prem). Set MULTI_TENANT=false and use your server's URL.
